title: dryopteris martinicensis
intro: Dryopteris martinicensis, also known as the Saint Martin's fern, is a species of fern native to the Caribbean, specifically the island of Saint Martin. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris martinicensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Dryopteris martinicensis is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, with some herbalists also using it in salves and creams for topical applications.
